author: lOrm
content: Issue calls for multiple WebSearch backends with API-key rotation + Anthropic-native web_search_20250305 (parity with CC WebSearchTool). Not addressable in a cleanup pass: requires Anthropic server-side tool plumbing (only available on firstParty/vertex claude-4+/foundry), backend abstraction trait, key-rotation state, and SearchResult typed return. Multi-day feature. Parent audit #523.
